hero.title: Stex
hero.description: Engineered for the future of fitness, Stex delivers premium, technology-driven workout ecosystems. Combining sleek European design with intelligent, interactive interfaces, Stex empowers athletes with fluid, high-performance training systems that redefine wellness and athletic excellence.

promoBanner.title: Fitness
promoBanner.subtitle: Essentials
promoBanner.description: Save on select NordicTrack equipment during the Winter Sale Event

featureSection1.title: Smart Rowing. Full-Body Results. Real Progress.
featureSection1.description: Experience a powerful, low-impact workout that engages your entire body. Smart rowing machines automatically adjust resistance to match your trainer's intensity, helping you build strength, endurance, and consistency— every session, every stroke.

featureSection2.title: Where Refined Design meets uncompromising power.
featureSection2.description: Experience a powerful, low-impact workout that engages your entire body. Smart rowing machines automatically adjust resistance to match your trainer's intensity, helping you build strength, endurance, and consistency— every session, every stroke.
